prompt: Describe what is visible and call out the most important objects or activity.
analysis: A long black circuit board or LED sign strip is lying horizontally on a wooden desk. It has many small components and connectors, with a large lighted/contrasting section in the middle that appears to spell or display “FIND” or similar block lettering. A black cable runs in from the right side. The main visible activity is a static hardware setup or inspection on the tabletop.
